name: project-briefer
description: Auto-detect project configs, README, and directory structure to generate a standardized project brief for Agent context.
intent_triggers: 產出一份專案背景說明
我要這個專案的技術棧資訊
能不能快速整理一下這個 repo 的結構
給我一份可以直接貼給 AI 的專案介紹
what is the tech stack of this project
幫我 scan 一下這個專案有哪些依賴和框架

path.description: Target project directory path to scan

output.description: Output file path for the brief

detail.description: Detail level: full or compact (< 500 tokens)

examples.intent: 掃描當前專案並生成摘要
Generate a compact brief with recent git activity

error_codes.1: Target directory not found or inaccessible
